description: The PlaybackStateDriver is a component that drives a set of booleans to whether or not certain states are currently active or not for a particular IPlayable.

fields.IsPlaying: Will drive IField to true if playing, false if not playing
fields.IsNotPlaying: Will drive IField to true is not playing, false if playing
fields.IsPaused: Will drive IField to true if playable is paused
fields.IsStopped: Will drive IField to true if playable is stopped

usage: Attach to a slot and provide ``Source`` any Bool provided to the other fields will be driven to the status of that field's status check.
